    Appendix A: The R System – A Brief Overview Create static html files for posting to GitHub "A Practical Guide ..." -- Style and Content Use of Code Files Chapter 1: Learning from data . . . Chapter 2: Generalizing from models Chapter 3: Multiple linear regression Chapter 4: Exploiting the linear model framework Chapter 5: Generalized linear models and survival analysis Chapter 6: Time series models Chapter 7: Multilevel models, and repeated measures Chapter 8: Tree-based Classification and Regression Chapter 9: Multivariate data exploration and discrimination Code for Selected Figures

    Create static html files for posting to GitHub

    John Maindonald

    2023-11-02

    GITready.Rmd

    This “vignette” records steps that can be followed when a vignette is changed or added, prior to committing changes that include static html files to GitHub.

    tools::buildVignettes(dir = ".", tangle=TRUE)
if(!dir.exists('inst'))dir.create("~/pkgs/PGRcode/inst")   
if(!dir.exists('inst/doc'))dir.create("~/pkgs/PGRcode/inst/doc") 
## On installation, files in 'inst/doc/' are copied to 'doc/'
file.copy(dir("vignettes", full.names=TRUE), "~/pkgs/PGRcode/inst/doc", overwrite=TRUE)

    Details of using pkgdown to set up the web page can be found at https://pkgdown.r-lib.org/articles/pkgdown.html#configuration

    usethis::use_pkgdown()
pkgdown::build_site()
usethis::use_pkgdown_github_pages()
usethis::use_github_action("render-rmarkdown")
usethis::use_github_action("check-release")

    On this page

    Developed by John H Maindonald.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
